metadata.title: Phase 2 Backlog: ccb_document Growth Plan
metadata.description: 7 proposed tasks to grow ccb_document from 13 to 20 tasks. Each task targets documentation generation from source code.

proposed_tasks.description: Generate comprehensive docstrings for an undocumented Django middleware module. Must include parameter descriptions, return types, and usage examples.
proposed_tasks.verifier_pattern: weighted checklist: docstring presence (0.3) + parameter documentation (0.3) + example correctness (0.2) + style compliance (0.2)
proposed_tasks.determinism: Ground truth: function signatures and behavior are deterministic for pinned commit. Checklist items are objectively verifiable.
proposed_tasks.partial_credit: Continuous 0.0-1.0: weighted by 4 checklist components as specified in verifier pattern

proposed_tasks.description: Generate Javadoc for Kafka's record batch serialization classes. Must document thread-safety guarantees and performance characteristics.
proposed_tasks.verifier_pattern: weighted checklist: Javadoc presence (0.3) + thread-safety documentation (0.3) + performance notes (0.2) + cross-reference accuracy (0.2)
proposed_tasks.determinism: Ground truth: class behavior and thread-safety properties are deterministic for pinned commit. Checklist items are objectively verifiable.
proposed_tasks.partial_credit: Continuous 0.0-1.0: weighted by 4 checklist components as specified in verifier pattern

proposed_tasks.description: Generate a changelog entry for a multi-commit feature branch. Must categorize changes (features, bug fixes, breaking changes) and reference relevant issues.
proposed_tasks.verifier_pattern: weighted checklist: change categorization accuracy (0.4) + completeness (0.3) + issue reference correctness (0.3)
proposed_tasks.determinism: Ground truth: commit history and issue references are deterministic for pinned commits. Change categories are objectively classifiable.
proposed_tasks.partial_credit: Continuous 0.0-1.0: weighted by 3 checklist components as specified in verifier pattern

proposed_tasks.description: Generate release notes summarizing API changes between two tagged versions. Must identify breaking changes, deprecations, and new features.
proposed_tasks.verifier_pattern: weighted checklist: breaking change identification (0.4) + deprecation detection (0.3) + new feature listing (0.3)
proposed_tasks.determinism: Ground truth: API differences between tags are deterministic. Change classification is objective.
proposed_tasks.partial_credit: Continuous 0.0-1.0: weighted by 3 checklist components as specified in verifier pattern

proposed_tasks.description: Generate a developer onboarding guide for Istio's control plane. Must cover build prerequisites, architecture overview, and first-contribution workflow.
proposed_tasks.verifier_pattern: weighted checklist: prerequisite accuracy (0.3) + architecture correctness (0.3) + workflow completeness (0.2) + code reference accuracy (0.2)
proposed_tasks.determinism: Ground truth: build system, architecture, and contribution workflow are deterministic for pinned commit. Checklist items are objectively verifiable.
proposed_tasks.partial_credit: Continuous 0.0-1.0: weighted by 4 checklist components as specified in verifier pattern

proposed_tasks.description: Generate an operational runbook for Prometheus's TSDB compaction process. Must include monitoring indicators, failure modes, and recovery procedures.
proposed_tasks.verifier_pattern: weighted checklist: monitoring indicator accuracy (0.3) + failure mode coverage (0.3) + recovery procedure correctness (0.2) + code reference accuracy (0.2)
proposed_tasks.determinism: Ground truth: TSDB compaction behavior and failure modes are deterministic for pinned commit. Checklist items are objectively verifiable.
proposed_tasks.partial_credit: Continuous 0.0-1.0: weighted by 4 checklist components as specified in verifier pattern

proposed_tasks.description: Generate a troubleshooting runbook for Envoy's connection pool management. Must document common failure scenarios, diagnostic commands, and configuration fixes.
proposed_tasks.verifier_pattern: weighted checklist: failure scenario accuracy (0.3) + diagnostic command correctness (0.3) + configuration fix validity (0.2) + code reference accuracy (0.2)
proposed_tasks.determinism: Ground truth: connection pool behavior and configuration options are deterministic for pinned commit. Checklist items are objectively verifiable.
proposed_tasks.partial_credit: Continuous 0.0-1.0: weighted by 4 checklist components as specified in verifier pattern
